'''Minos Fel'Kona''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Fel'Kona was the son of the famed [[Jedi recruiter]] Master [[Jonas Fel'Kona]].

==Biography==
The [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] son of the prominent [[Acquisition Division/Legends|Acquisition Division]] [[Jedi recruiter|recruiter]] [[Jonas Fel'Kona]], Minos was turned over to the [[Almas Academy|Academy]] of [[Almas]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Fel'Kona became a wise [[Jedi investigator/Legends|investigator]] for the academy, following in his father's footsteps as a [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinel]].<ref name="TE" />

As a Knight, Fel'Kona investigated the [[Almas Sith fortress|fortress]] of [[Darth Rivan]] on Almas during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] that plagued the Republic. During the numerous investigations, Fel'Kona determined that the fortress had been built prior to [[1,163 BBY]]. Among his discoveries were skeletons of [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragons]] and slabs of black marble recording the succession of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]] from [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] to Darth Rivan.<ref name="The Sith Fortress">{{Wizards|url=rpga/livingforce/article.asp?x=lf/swlf20020425asithfortress&c=swlfc|text=The Sith Fortress}}</ref> When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Fel'Kona remained in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] during the conflict, maintaining his normal duties on Almas. Participating in an interview by journalist [[Yara Grugara]], Jedi Fel'Kona spoke directly with other interviewees regarding the growing Cularin-based opposition to the [[Thaereian military]]'s presence in the system. The [[Thaereian system|Thaereians]] had served as the protectors of the Cularin system as part of a protectorate agreement—an agreement some of the people of Cularin thought the Thaereians were abusing. Stating that the Cularin people could put in a plea to their [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] if they wanted the deal changed, Fel'Kona did not announce the Jedi's official stance.<ref name="Jurisdiction">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20030904jurisdiction|text=Jurisdiction}}</ref>

In the final year of the war, the Almas Academy was destroyed by [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] orchestrated by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Garth Ezzar]].<ref name="Destruction">{{LivingForce|Heart of Evil: Destruction}}</ref> Escaping the attack, recently elevated [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] Fel'Kona began searching for survivors. It wasn't long after this event that the command was issued to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to execute [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a traitorous order by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] that effectively disbanded the Order. As noted in his [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], Master Fel'Kona felt lost when confronted with the idea of a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in charge of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and could not conceptualize how the Order would continue to exist. He recognized the need to fight back against Palpatine's tyranny, but he also believed that Darth Sidious and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] would be ready for any attempt on their lives, and would utterly destroy any being who tried to harm them. He vowed to take any surviving Jedi he could find in the Cularin system and flee into the depths of the galaxy, where they could be relatively safe while contemplating their next course of action.<ref name="What Are We, Then?">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/lf20051013whatarewe|text=What Are We, Then?}}</ref>
